‘Benchmark Disabilities’. It is further submitted that as per 
clause 7(vi) of the advertisement published on 14.04.2022, 
the Respondent No.4 provided the benefits of scribe to PwBD 
i.e., Blind or low vision candidates, whose disability was 40% 
or more and who opted for such facilities. It is also submitted 
that the petitioner did not approach the Respondent No. 4 with 
a request to provide a scribe, and hence, he is not entitled 
to claim any relief in this writ petition.
